title: Fermented Crispy Dutch Pistachio Stir-fry
description: A vegan-friendly and romantic Dutch dish featuring a unique combination of fermented tofu, crispy pistachios, and aromatic vegetables in a savory sauce, perfect for any meal.

ingredients.name: sauce mix (soy sauce, vinegar, sugar, cornstarch)

instructions: Heat vegetable oil in a wok over medium-high heat. Add sliced ginger and chopped onion; sauté for about 1 minute.
Add minced garlic and leek or green onion. Stir-fry for another minute until fragrant and slightly golden.
Add crushed fermented tofu to the wok, tossing quickly to coat with oil and spices. Cook for about 2 minutes, stirring frequently.
Stir in chopped pistachios and continue cooking until they start to turn golden brown (around 5-7 more minutes).
Pour sauce mix over the stir-fry mixture in a blender or by hand, blending until smooth. Return mixture back into the wok and cook for an additional minute.
Serve hot with steamed rice or as a side dish.
